channel.title: FiveToFifteen
channel.description: New stories, challenge pages, competitions, and exam practice from FiveToFifteen.

item.title: The Magic Number Forest 🌟
item.description: Adventures in adding & taking away · For ages 6–8

item.title: The 7 Wonders of the World! 🌍
item.description: Explore amazing places that people built long, long ago! · For ages 5–8

item.title: Add with 1! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 1 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 10! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 10 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 2! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 2 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 3! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 3 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 4! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 4 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 5! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 5 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 6! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 6 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 7! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 7 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 8! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 8 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Add with 9! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 9 addition table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Addition Table Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition table worksheets with table completion, cut and match, revision, and final tests.

item.title: Addition Tables Hub | FiveToFifteen
item.description: One hub page for all addition-table stories from 1 to 10.

item.title: Alphabet Worksheets A-Z | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable alphabet worksheets from A to Z for early learners.

item.title: The Boy Who Planted Kindness 🌱
item.description: An interactive storybook for kids about kindness, generosity, and how good deeds grow and come back when needed most.

item.title: The Bridge Builders 🌉
item.description: A leadership and teamwork story for ages 10-15 about courage, communication, and solving hard problems together.

item.title: My First Chemistry Adventure | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Foundation chemistry story for kids covering Chemistry basics for young learners with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: The Material Match Mission | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 1 chemistry story for kids covering Properties of objects and materials; purpose with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: Bend, Stretch, Cut, Mix! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 2 chemistry story for kids covering Physical changes and mixing materials with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: Solid, Liquid, Gas Express | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 3 chemistry story for kids covering Properties of solids, liquids and gases with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: The State Change Station | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 4 chemistry story for kids covering Changes of state; reversible vs irreversible changes with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: Particle Detective Academy | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 5 chemistry story for kids covering Particle model and state changes with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: Matter Mystery Investigators | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Year 6 chemistry story for kids covering Physical vs chemical changes; conservation of matter with diagrams, activities, and quizzes.

item.title: Tick Tock Time! ⏰
item.description: Learn how to read clocks, understand the hands, and tell time with confidence! · For ages 5–9

item.title: Clock and Time Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable clock and time worksheets for drawing hands, writing times, matching clocks, sorting morning and afternoon, and routine timelines.

item.title: The Cloud Who Refused to Rain ☁️
item.description: Interactive moral story for kids: The Cloud Who Refused to Rain

item.title: Weekly Competition - Week 2
item.description: Weekly Competition - Week 2 on FiveToFifteen under Competition.

item.title: The Dragon Who Was Scared of Fire 🐉
item.description: Interactive moral story for kids: The Dragon Who Was Scared of Fire

item.title: Journey to the Centre of the Earth! 🌎
item.description: An underground adventure through Earth's amazing layers! · For ages 5–8

item.title: The Elephant Who Never Forgot a Friend 🐘
item.description: Interactive moral story for kids: The Elephant Who Never Forgot a Friend

item.title: Feelings and Faces
item.description: Look at the scene. Tap the face that matches.

item.title: First, Then Routine Adventure
item.description: Follow calm everyday routines one small step at a time.

item.title: Addition Bubble Pop
item.description: Pop the bubble that matches the addition answer. You have 60 seconds and 3 lives.

item.title: Clock Match Rush
item.description: Find the matching analog clock as quickly as you can.

item.title: Grammar Fix-it Lab
item.description: Grammar Fix-it Lab on FiveToFifteen under Learning Page.

item.title: Multiplication Meteor
item.description: Tap the meteor with the correct answer before it escapes. You have 60 seconds and 3 lives.

item.title: The Girl Who Listened to the Ocean 🌊
item.description: Interactive moral story for kids: The Girl Who Listened to the Ocean

item.title: How Hard Work Leads to Success! 🌟
item.description: A motivational storybook for kids about hard work, practise, patience, and success.

item.title: How Rain Happens! 🌧️
item.description: Discover how water rises, cools, forms clouds, and falls back down as rain! · For ages 5–9

item.title: Ideas | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Ideas, future plans, topic suggestions, and content directions for FiveToFifteen.

item.title: The Lantern That Only Lit for Honest Hearts 🏮
item.description: Interactive moral story for kids: The Lantern That Only Lit for Honest Hearts

item.title: The Last Seed Vault 🌱
item.description: A long-form adventure story for ages 10-15 about science, teamwork, courage, food diversity, and protecting nature.

item.title: The Little Star Who Was Afraid to Shine ✨
item.description: An interactive storybook for kids about self-belief, courage, and how small acts can make a big difference.

item.title: Matching Fun
item.description: Look at the picture. Tap the one that goes with it.

item.title: How Long Is It? 📏 Measuring with a Ruler!
item.description: For curious kids aged 5–8 · 16 pages of measuring fun!

item.title: Mia and the Rainbow Kitchen 🌈
item.description: A long-form interactive moral story for kids ages 5-10 about colourful food, healthy habits, and imagination.

item.title: Multiply with 1! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 1 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated sums, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 10! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 10 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 2! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 2 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 3! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 3 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 4! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 4 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 5! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 5 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 6! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 6 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 7! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 7 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 8! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 8 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiply with 9! | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Learn the number 9 multiplication table with a fun storybook, animated facts, practice questions, and a certificate.

item.title: Multiplication Tables Hub | FiveToFifteen
item.description: One hub page for all multiplication-table stories from 1 to 10.

item.title: Multiplication Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable multiplication worksheets for table practice, skip counting, repeated addition, missing factors, word problems, table mazes, and mixed challenges.

item.title: News | FiveToFifteen
item.description: News, updates, launches, and friendly announcements from FiveToFifteen.
